item.title: ⚾ MLB Rank: Ranking baseball's top 100 players
item.description: From star sluggers like Ohtani and Judge to top pitchers like Skubal, we rank -- and make predictions for -- the best players in baseball right now.

item.title: Sources: Celtics' Tatum expected to return Fri.
item.description: Celtics superstar Jayson Tatum is expected to make his 2025-26 NBA season debut against the Dallas Mavericks on Friday night at TD Garden, sources tol...

item.title: Bills trading for Bears WR Moore, sources say
item.description: The Bears have agreed to a trade to send wide receiver DJ Moore to the Bills, sources told ESPN's Adam Schefter.

item.title: Sources: Saints sack king Jordan to be free agent
item.description: Saints defensive end Cameron Jordan will become a free agent when the new league begins next week, sources told ESPN's Adam Schefter.

item.title: UNC star Wilson still not cleared for Duke return
item.description: Star freshman Caleb Wilson is increasing practice work for No. 17 North Carolina ahead of the rivalry game at No. 1 Duke but has yet to be cleared for...
